articles.title: Grayscale drops Cardano and Cosmos from its crypto funds in quarterly rebalancing
articles.description: Prominent crypto asset management firm Grayscale has removed two high-profile digital assets, Cardano and Cosmos, from its multi-asset funds as part of its quarterly fund rebalancing. In an April 4 press statement, the firm revealed that it removed Cardano from its Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund (GDLC) and Cosmos’s ATOM token from the Grayscale Smart […] The post Grayscale drops Cardano and Cosmos from its crypto funds in quarterly rebalancing appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Sony Bank to experiment on stablecoins through Polygon
